---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
<!-- Clear description of the feature you'd like to see -->

## Use Case
<!-- Why is this feature valuable? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed Implementation
<!-- Optional: How do you think this could be implemented? -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Optional: Other approaches you've considered -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Screenshots, mockups, examples, or anything else that helps explain the feature -->

## Are you willing to contribute?
<!-- Would you like to help implement this feature? -->
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to help
- [ ] No, just suggesting
